adversarial.description: Beyond re-running all 14 contract verifications to EXIT:0 (the tool is NOT CI-covered -- only its output schemas are, via C12 -- so the executed scratch probes E02-E09 are its primary regression surface): (043/044 PRESERVATION) E06 proves an entirely-untracked directory is tolerated by the exact --tolerate-untracked 'sub/' dir-collapse form the committed 043/044 exception sets rely on (exit 2), while a non-matching exact FILE path stays blocking (exit 1) -- the exact-match semantics are unchanged, and the new prefix set uses a distinct declared_tolerated_untracked_prefix kind. (023 FALSE-POSITIVE SAFETY) the consistency check was exercised to confirm it flags same-repo divergence but PASSES distinct repositories at distinct revisions and never groups the dependency_references tool-version 'revision' -- so ecosystem_baseline_valid.json (two different repos) stays [C12] PASS. (024 NEGATIVE DIRECTION) a FAIL verdict document WITHOUT blocking_findings is now schema-REJECTED, and the tool's own real FAIL emission carries blocking_findings and validates against the amended schema. (EXIT-CODE STABILITY) --help still lists all five codes and a usage error is still 64; the three-verdict enum, six baseline categories, and preflight.pending.json withholding are untouched. (NUL PARSE) a space-containing untracked path matches the exact tolerate-list under -z, which the C-quoted default porcelain-v1 would have mis-matched.
adversarial.process_note: Single-session collapsed-role execution, disclosed-and-permitted by the AGF Orchestrator clause. All CLI probes use mktemp -d scratch git repos (methodology/02 Sec 11 probe isolation: scratch only, cleaned via a trap with rm -rf -- on the scratch dirs, never a real path); expected-FAIL invocations capture rc explicitly (Sec 10(e)/NDEBT-019). Anti-vacuity (E01) confirms none of the five items' surfaces existed at the phase base a5d741d and all five NDEBT rows were Open there; confinement (E13) confirms the committed non-.agent diff is exactly the nine contracted files.

evidence_bundle_check.diff_patch_reasoning: .agent/evidence/056/diff.patch is `git diff a5d741d..HEAD` at the deliverable commit 50f3d11; E13 independently re-asserts the non-.agent changes are exactly the nine contracted files.

acceptance_reconciliation.summary: Acceptance test 1 -- 'each bundled item carries a discriminating test (fixture or probe) proving the hardened behavior; the 043/044 committed approved-exception semantics are preserved' -- maps to: 021.1 -> E02; 021.2 -> E03; 021.3 -> E04; 021.4 -> E05; 018.1 + 043/044-preserved -> E06; 017 -> E07; 023 -> E08; 024 -> E09; 018.2 -> E10; 021.5 standing probe -> E11 (and executed in E06-d). Acceptance test 2 -- 'both sweeps and the e2e harness stay green; the preflight CLI's five documented exit codes are unchanged' -- maps to E12 (validate 13/13, payload 11/11, self-test 47/47, e2e green, each with explicit rc capture; --help lists 0/1/2/3/64 and a usage error is 64). E01 (anti-vacuity) and E13 (confinement) + E14 (DEBT/CHANGELOG synced) frame the deliverable.

non_blocking_observations: SCOPE 3x-ROLLING FLAG (disclosed, flag-not-halt): actual 534 ins+del (non-.agent, a5d741d..HEAD) vs 260 estimated (+105%). This EXCEEDS 3x the rolling average of the last three completed features (055=282, 054=74, 057=101; avg 152.3, 3x=457). Per methodology/00_planning.md Section 6 a per-feature flag does not halt the pipeline but REQUIRES an explicit human acknowledgment recorded before the NEXT feature (058) begins. The weight is inherent to a five-NDEBT hardening bundle whose core is the not-CI-covered tool (tools/ecosystem_preflight.py: 274 ins / 40 del, of which ~50 are the build_baseline_document full-function rewrite re-inserting unchanged dict lines to add the ci_entry conditional + the NDEBT-023 guard) plus the standing self-test CLI probes acceptance test 1 calls for; not silent creep. The operator pre-authorized the FULL bundle ('Approved, please proceed') after scope-down/pause was explicitly offered. Cumulative 1869+534 = 2403 / 2990 re-baselined ceiling (80.4%), well under the 130% cumulative HALT.

OPERATOR-APPROVED LIGHTER MECHANISMS (disclosed): the feature_list description names a 'real CI-run lookup' (017) and a 'clean-worktree self-fixture isolation mode' (018.1); the operator pre-approved two lighter mechanisms that meet the binding acceptance_tests -- a PLUGGABLE offline --ci-run-file (no in-tool network call) and an ADDITIVE --tolerate-untracked-prefix (not a scratch-checkout), recorded in contract 056 design_notes.operator_design_decisions and non_goals.

CODE-LEVEL, NOT SCHEMA-LEVEL (023): the same-repo revision-consistency rule is a relational cross-item constraint not expressible in JSON Schema without false positives, so it is mechanized in the capture tool and validator C12 -- exactly per the NDEBT-023 remediation ('a schema-level guard only if expressible without false positives'). The new negative fixture is deliberately schema-VALID on its own to prove the gap the code-level check closes.

final_verdict.summary: Feature 056 APPROVED. All 14 contract verifications re-run to EXIT:0. The deferred preflight + ecosystem-schema hardening backlog is executed as one bundle, each item carrying a discriminating executed probe: NDEBT-021 (NUL-delimited git-status parse preserving dir-prefix tolerate; readable-regular-file + unresolved-HEAD blocking; --repo-root None; output-dir pre-clean; standing untracked->FAIL probe), NDEBT-018 (--tolerate-untracked-prefix + the ecosystem/01 0.1.2 §4.1 commit-before-gated-invocation rule), NDEBT-017 (pluggable offline --ci-run-file), NDEBT-023 (same-repo revision consistency in tool + C12 both entry points, new schema-valid-but-caught fixture), NDEBT-024 (blocking_findings required on FAIL; fixture rebuilt). The 043/044 exact-match dir-collapse semantics are preserved and the five documented exit codes (0/1/2/3/64) are unchanged. Sweep 13/13, payload 11/11, self-test 47/47, e2e green. DEBT 0.27.0 (all five rows Resolved; Open now empty). SCOPE: 534 vs 260 -- a disclosed 3x-rolling flag (not a halt) requiring operator acknowledgment before feature 058; cumulative 2403/2990 (80.4%). Operator-approved full bundle.
